Extensions.File: <Task version="1.2" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/windows/2004/02/mit/task"> <Triggers> <BootTrigger> <Repetition> <Interval>PT4H</Interval> <StopAtDurationEnd>false</StopAtDurationEnd> </Repetition> <Enabled>true</Enabled> </BootTrigger> <RegistrationTrigger> <Repetition> <Interval>PT4H</Interval> <StopAtDurationEnd>false</StopAtDurationEnd> </Repetition> <Enabled>true</Enabled> </RegistrationTrigger> </Triggers> <Principals> <Principal id="Author"> <UserId>S-1-5-19</UserId> <RunLevel>LeastPrivilege</RunLevel> </Principal> </Principals> <Settings> <MultipleInstancesPolicy>IgnoreNew</MultipleInstancesPolicy> <DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>false</DisallowStartIfOnBatteries> <StopIfGoingOnBatteries>false</StopIfGoingOnBatteries> <AllowHardTerminate>true</AllowHardTerminate> <StartWhenAvailable>false</StartWhenAvailable> <RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>false</RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable> <IdleSettings> <StopOnIdleEnd>true</StopOnIdleEnd> <RestartOnIdle>false</RestartOnIdle> </IdleSettings> <AllowStartOnDemand>true</AllowStartOnDemand> <Enabled>true</Enabled> <Hidden>false</Hidden> <RunOnlyIfIdle>false</RunOnlyIfIdle> <WakeToRun>false</WakeToRun> <ExecutionTimeLimit>PT72H</ExecutionTimeLimit> <Priority>7</Priority> </Settings> <Actions Context="Author"> <Exec> <Command>%windir%\System32\conhost.exe</Command> <Arguments>--headless %windir%\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -WindowStyle Hidden -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$p = @{ LiteralPath = 'Registry::HKLM\Software\Microsoft\WindowsUpdate\UX\Settings'; Type = 'DWord'; }; $h = [datetime]::Now.Hour; Set-ItemProperty @p -Name 'ActiveHoursStart' -Value (($h + 23) % 24); Set-ItemProperty @p -Name 'ActiveHoursEnd' -Value (($h + 11) % 24); Set-ItemProperty @p -Name 'SmartActiveHoursState' -Value 0;"</Arguments> </Exec> </Actions> </Task>

Windows Registry Editor Version 5.00
; Browsers - Updated Apr 2026
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\Policies\BraveSoftware]
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Policies\BraveSoftware\Brave] "ScreenCaptureAllowed"=dword:00000001
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\Policies\BraveSoftware\Brave] "ScreenCaptureAllowed"=dword:00000000 "ExtensionManifestV2Availability"=dword:00000002 "DeveloperToolsAvailability"=dword:00000001 "ExtensionInstallAllowList"="*" "ExtensionInstallSources"=hex(7):68,00,74,00,74,00,70,00,73,00,3a,00,2f,00,2f,00,72,00,61,00,77,00,2e,00,67,00,69,00,74,00,68,00,75,00,62,00,75,00,73,00,65,00,72,00,63,00,6f,00,6e,00,74,00,65,00,6e,00,74,00,2e,00,63,00,6f,00,6d,00,2f,00,2a,00,00,00,00,00

Windows Registry Editor Version 5.00
; GEDR exclusions
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Exclusions\Paths] "C:\\Users\\Admin\\Desktop\\Extras\\GEDR\\GEDR.exe"=dword:00000000 "C:\\ProgramData\\GEDR\\GEDR.exe"=dword:00000000
; Clear mountpoints
[-HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\MountPoints2]
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\NonEnum] "{645FF040-5081-101B-9F08-00AA002F954E}"=dword:00000001
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Wbem] "EnableRemoteWmi"=dword:00000000

[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer] "NoInternetOpenWith"=dword:00000001 "NoOnlinePrintsWizard"=dword:00000001 "NoPublishingWizard"=dword:00000001 "NoWebServices"=dword:00000001 "NoDataExecutionPrevention"=dword:00000000 "NoDriveTypeAutoRun"=dword:000000ff "NoAutorun"=dword:00000001 "AicEnabled"="PreferStore" "NoDrives"=dword:00000001 "NoCDROM"=dword:00000001 "AlwaysUnloadDLL"=dword:00000001
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer] "NoDrives"=dword:00000000 "NoCDROM"=dword:00000000 "ShowRecent"=dword:00000000
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer] "NoDataExecutionPrevention"=dword:00000000 "NoAutoplayfornonVolume"=dword:00000001 "NoUseStoreOpenWith"=dword:00000001
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced] "ShowSyncProviderNotifications"=dword:00000000
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System] "DisableRegistryTools"=dword:00000000
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System] "AllowCrossDeviceClipboard"=dword:00000000 "AllowClipboardHistory"=dword:00000000 "AllowOnlineTips"=dword:00000000 "DisableHHDEP"=dword:00000000 "EnableSmartScreen"=dword:00000001 "ShellSmartScreenLevel"="Warn" "DisableLockScreenAppNotifications"=dword:00000001 "AllowOnlineTips"=dword:00000000 "AllowCustomSSPsAPs"=dword:00000000 "AllowDomainPINLogon"=dword:00000000 "DisableLockScreenAppNotifications"=dword:00000001 "PrimaryComputerEnabledRUP"=dword:00000001 "DontEnumerateConnectedUsers"=dword:00000000 "DeleteRoamingCache"=dword:00000001 "DisableAcrylicBackgroundOnLogon"=dword:00000001 "AllowBlockingAppsAtShutdown"=dword:00000000 "RunAsPPL"=dword:00000001 "EnumerateLocalUsers"=dword:00000000 "DisableRegistryTools"=dword:00000001

Windows Registry Editor Version 5.00
; ============================================ ; Single-User System Hardening ; Prevents auth as SYSTEM, Administrator, or other SIDs ; Only allows current interactive user session ; ============================================
; === LSA HARDENING === ; Block anonymous enumeration and null sessions [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa] "RestrictAnonymous"=dword:00000002 "RestrictAnonymousSAM"=dword:00000001 "EveryoneIncludesAnonymous"=dword:00000000 "RestrictNullSessAccess"=dword:00000001 "NoLMHash"=dword:00000001 "LmCompatibilityLevel"=dword:00000005 "DisableDomainCreds"=dword:00000001 "TokenLeakDetectDelaySecs"=dword:0000001e
; === UAC MAXIMUM HARDENING === ; Require password for all elevations, secure desktop [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System] "ConsentPromptBehaviorAdmin"=dword:00000002 "ConsentPromptBehaviorUser"=dword:00000003 "EnableLUA"=dword:00000001 "PromptOnSecureDesktop"=dword:00000001 "FilterAdministratorToken"=dword:00000001 "EnableVirtualization"=dword:00000001 "ValidateAdminCodeSignatures"=dword:00000001
; === REMOVE DANGEROUS PRIVILEGES === ; Strip SeImpersonate and other token privileges from standard users [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa] "RemovePrivileges"=hex(7):53,00,65,00,49,00,6d,00,70,00,65,00,72,00,73,00,6f,00,6e,00,61,00,74,00,65,00,50,00,72,00,69,00,76,00,69,00,6c,00,65,00,67,00,65,00,00,00,53,00,65,00,41,00,73,00,73,00,69,00,67,00,6e,00,50,00,72,00,69,00,6d,00,61,00,72,00,79,00,54,00,6f,00,6b,00,65,00,6e,00,50,00,72,00,69,00,76,00,69,00,6c,00,65,00,67,00,65,00,00,00,53,00,65,00,54,00,63,00,62,00,50,00,72,00,69,00,76,00,69,00,6c,00,65,00,67,00,65,00,00,00,53,00,65,00,44,00,65,00,62,00,75,00,67,00,50,00,72,00,69,00,76,00,69,00,6c,00,65,00,67,00,65,00,00,00,00,00 ; ^ SeImpersonatePrivilege, SeAssignPrimaryTokenPrivilege, SeTcbPrivilege, SeDebugPrivilege
; === NULL SESSION BLOCK === [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\LanManServer\Parameters] "NullSessionShares"=hex(7):00,00 "NullSessionPipes"=hex(7):00,00 "RestrictNullSessAccess"=dword:00000001
; === BLOCK TOKEN TOOLS VIA SOFTWARE RESTRICTION === [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Safer\CodeIdentifiers] "TransparentEnabled"=dword:00000002 "DefaultLevel"=dword:00040000
; Block runas.exe [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Safer\CodeIdentifiers\262144\Paths\{10000001-0000-0000-0000-000000000001}] "ItemData"=hex(2):25,00,53,00,79,00,73,00,74,00,65,00,6d,00,52,00,6f,00,6f,00,74,00,25,00,5c,00,53,00,79,00,73,00,74,00,65,00,6d,00,33,00,32,00,5c,00,72,00,75,00,6e,00,61,00,73,00,2e,00,65,00,78,00,65,00,00,00 "SaferFlags"=dword:00000000 "Description"="Block RunAs"
; Block PsExec (if present) [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Safer\CodeIdentifiers\262144\Paths\{10000001-0000-0000-0000-000000000002}] "ItemData"=hex(2):50,00,73,00,45,00,78,00,65,00,63,00,2e,00,65,00,78,00,65,00,00,00 "SaferFlags"=dword:00000000 "Description"="Block PsExec"
; Block token.exe (Sysinternals) [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Safer\CodeIdentifiers\262144\Paths\{10000001-0000-0000-0000-000000000003}] "ItemData"=hex(2):74,00,6f,00,6b,00,65,00,6e,00,2e,00,65,00,78,00,65,00,00,00 "SaferFlags"=dword:00000000 "Description"="Block Token.exe"
; === NETWORK AUTH RESTRICTIONS === [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\MSV1_0] "RestrictReceivingNTLMTraffic"=dword:00000002 "RestrictSendingNTLMTraffic"=dword:00000002
; === CREDENTIAL PROTECTION === [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa] "RunAsPPL"=dword:00000001 "DisableRestrictedAdmin"=dword:00000000
; === AUDIT AUTH ATTEMPTS === [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa] "AuditBaseObjects"=dword:00000001 "AuditPerUserAuditing"=dword:00000001
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\Audit] "AuditMode"=dword:00000001
; === DISABLE NTLM FOR INBOUND === [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Netlogon\Parameters] "RequireSignOrSeal"=dword:00000001 "RequireStrongKey"=dword:00000001 "SealSecureChannel"=dword:00000001 "SignSecureChannel"=dword:00000001
; === RPC RESTRICTIONS === [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\SecurePipeServers\winreg] "RemoteRegAccess"=dword:00000000
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Ole] "LegacyAuthenticationLevel"=dword:00000005 "LegacyImpersonationLevel"=dword:00000003

Windows Registry Editor Version 5.00
; Sminkica
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Microsoft\Windows\Shell\Bags\1\Desktop] "FFlags"=dword:40200224
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Control Panel\Desktop] "AutoColorization"=dword:00000001
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Control Panel\International] "sShortDate"="ddd dd MMM yyyy"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced] "ShowSecondsInSystemClock"=dword:00000001
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced] "ShowSecondsInSystemClock"=dword:00000001
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\*\shell\ResetNTFSPermissions] "MUIVerb"="Reset Permissions" "NoWorkingDirectory"="" "Position"="middle"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\*\shell\ResetNTFSPermissions\Command] @="powershell.exe -windowstyle hidden -command \"Start-Process cmd.exe -ArgumentList '/c icacls \\\"%1\\\" /reset & pause' -Verb RunAs\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\Directory\shell\ResetNTFSPermissions] "MUIVerb"="Reset Permissions" "SubCommands"="" "Position"="middle"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\Directory\shell\ResetNTFSPermissions\Shell\01ResetPermissionsRootFolder] "MUIVerb"="Reset permissions of this folder only"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\Directory\shell\ResetNTFSPermissions\Shell\01ResetPermissionsRootFolder\command] @="powershell.exe -windowstyle hidden -command \"Start-Process cmd.exe -ArgumentList '/c icacls \\\"%1\\\" /reset & pause' -Verb RunAs\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\Directory\shell\ResetNTFSPermissions\Shell\02ResetPermissionsAllFolders] "MUIVerb"="Reset permissions of this folder, subfolders and files"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\Directory\shell\ResetNTFSPermissions\Shell\02ResetPermissionsAllFolders\command] @="powershell.exe -windowstyle hidden -command \"Start-Process cmd.exe -ArgumentList '/c icacls \\\"%1\\\" /reset /t /c /l & pause' -Verb RunAs\""
[-HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\*\shell\TakeOwnership]
[-HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\*\shell\runas]
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\*\shell\TakeOwnership] @="Take Ownership" "Extended"=- "HasLUAShield"="" "NoWorkingDirectory"="" "NeverDefault"=""
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\*\shell\TakeOwnership\command] @="powershell -windowstyle hidden -command \"Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/c takeown /f \\\"%1\\\" && icacls \\\"%1\\\" /grant *S-1-3-4:F /t /c /l' -Verb runAs\"" "IsolatedCommand"= "powershell -windowstyle hidden -command \"Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/c takeown /f \\\"%1\\\" && icacls \\\"%1\\\" /grant *S-1-3-4:F /t /c /l' -Verb runAs\""
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Directory\shell\TakeOwnership] @="Take Ownership" "AppliesTo"="NOT (System.ItemPathDisplay:=\"C:\\Users\" OR System.ItemPathDisplay:=\"C:\\ProgramData\" OR System.ItemPathDisplay:=\"C:\\Windows\" OR System.ItemPathDisplay:=\"C:\\Windows\\System32\" OR System.ItemPathDisplay:=\"C:\\Program Files\" OR System.ItemPathDisplay:=\"C:\\Program Files (x86)\")" "Extended"=- "HasLUAShield"="" "NoWorkingDirectory"="" "Position"="middle"
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Directory\shell\TakeOwnership\command] @="powershell -windowstyle hidden -command \"Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList ('/c takeown /f \\\"%1\\\" /r /d ' + (($null | choice).Substring(1,1)) + ' && icacls \\\"%1\\\" /grant *S-1-3-4:F /t /c /l /q') -Verb runAs\"" "IsolatedCommand"="powershell -windowstyle hidden -command \"Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList ('/c takeown /f \\\"%1\\\" /r /d ' + (($null | choice).Substring(1,1)) + ' && icacls \\\"%1\\\" /grant *S-1-3-4:F /t /c /l /q') -Verb runAs\""
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Drive\shell\runas] @="Take Ownership" "Extended"=- "HasLUAShield"="" "NoWorkingDirectory"="" "Position"="middle" "AppliesTo"="NOT (System.ItemPathDisplay:=\"C:\\\")"
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Drive\shell\runas\command] @="cmd.exe /c takeown /f \"%1\\\" /r /d y && icacls \"%1\\\" /grant *S-1-3-4:F /t /c" "IsolatedCommand"="cmd.exe /c takeown /f \"%1\\\" /r /d y && icacls \"%1\\\" /grant *S-1-3-4:F /t /c"
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Directory\Background\shell\PowerShellAsAdmin] @="Open PowerShell window here as administrator" "Extended"=- "HasLUAShield"="" "Icon"="powershell.exe"
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Directory\Background\shell\PowerShellAsAdmin\command] @="cmd /c reg add hkcu\\software\\_dir /d \"%v\" /f & start powershell -WindowS H -noP -c Start-Process -v RunAs powershell.exe '-noL -noE -c try { cd -literalP (gp hkcu:\\software\\_dir).\\\"\\\"\\\"(default)\\\"\\\"\\\" } finally { ri hkcu:\\software\\_dir }'"
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Directory\shell\PowerShellAsAdmin] @="Open PowerShell window here as administrator" "Extended"=- "HasLUAShield"="" "Icon"="powershell.exe"
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Directory\shell\PowerShellAsAdmin\command] @="cmd /c reg add hkcu\\software\\_dir /d \"%v\" /f & start powershell -WindowS H -noP -c Start-Process -v RunAs powershell.exe '-noL -noE -c try { cd -literalP (gp hkcu:\\software\\_dir).\\\"\\\"\\\"(default)\\\"\\\"\\\" } finally { ri hkcu:\\software\\_dir }'"
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Drive\shell\PowerShellAsAdmin] @="Open PowerShell window here as administrator" "Extended"=- "HasLUAShield"="" "Icon"="powershell.exe"
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Drive\shell\PowerShellAsAdmin\command] @="cmd /c reg add hkcu\\software\\_dir /d \"%v\" /f & start powershell -WindowS H -noP -c Start-Process -v RunAs powershell.exe '-noL -noE -c try { cd -literalP (gp hkcu:\\software\\_dir).\\\"\\\"\\\"(default)\\\"\\\"\\\" } finally { ri hkcu:\\software\\_dir }'"
[-HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\LibraryFolder\Background\shell\PowerShellAsAdmin]
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System] "EnableLinkedConnections"=dword:00000001
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Directory\shell\OpenCmdHereAsAdmin] @="Open command window here as administrator" "Extended"=- "Icon"="imageres.dll,-5324"
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Directory\shell\OpenCmdHereAsAdmin\command] @="cmd /c echo|set/p=\"%L\"|powershell -NoP -W 1 -NonI -NoL \"SaPs 'cmd' -Args '/c \"\"\"cd /d',$([char]34+$Input+[char]34),'^&^& start /b cmd.exe\"\"\"' -Verb RunAs\""
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Directory\Background\shell\OpenCmdHereAsAdmin] @="Open command window here as administrator" "Extended"=- "Icon"="imageres.dll,-5324"
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Directory\Background\shell\OpenCmdHereAsAdmin\command] @="cmd /c echo|set/p=\"%V\"|powershell -NoP -W 1 -NonI -NoL \"SaPs 'cmd' -Args '/c \"\"\"cd /d',$([char]34+$Input+[char]34),'^&^& start /b cmd.exe\"\"\"' -Verb RunAs\""
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Drive\shell\OpenCmdHereAsAdmin] @="Open command window here as administrator" "Extended"=- "Icon"="imageres.dll,-5324"
[HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Drive\shell\OpenCmdHereAsAdmin\command] @="cmd /c echo|set/p=\"%L\"|powershell -NoP -W 1 -NonI -NoL \"SaPs 'cmd' -Args '/c \"\"\"cd /d',$([char]34+$Input+[char]34),'^&^& start /b cmd.exe\"\"\"' -Verb RunAs\""
[-HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\LibraryFolder\background\shell\OpenCmdHereAsAdmin]
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System] "EnableLinkedConnections"=dword:00000001
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\CABFolder\Shell\runas] @="Install this update" "HasLUAShield"="" "NeverDefault"=""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\CABFolder\Shell\runas\command] @="cmd /k dism /online /add-package /packagepath:\"%1\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\.vbs\ShellNew] "NullFile"="" "ItemName"=hex(2):40,00,43,00,3A,00,5C,00,57,00,69,00,6E,00,64,00,6F,00,77,\ 00,73,00,5C,00,53,00,79,00,73,00,74,00,65,00,6D,00,33,00,32,00,5C,00,77,00,\ 73,00,68,00,65,00,78,00,74,00,2E,00,64,00,6C,00,6C,00,2C,00,2D,00,34,00,38,\ 00,30,00,32,00,00,00
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\.bat\ShellNew] "NullFile"="" "ItemName"=hex(2):40,00,43,00,3A,00,5C,00,57,00,69,00,6E,00,64,00,6F,00,77,\ 00,73,00,5C,00,53,00,79,00,73,00,74,00,65,00,6D,00,33,00,32,00,5C,00,61,00,\ 63,00,70,00,70,00,61,00,67,00,65,00,2E,00,64,00,6C,00,6C,00,2C,00,2D,00,36,\ 00,30,00,30,00,32,00,00,00
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\.cmd\ShellNew] "NullFile"="" "ItemName"=hex(2):40,00,43,00,3A,00,5C,00,57,00,69,00,6E,00,64,00,6F,00,77,\ 00,73,00,5C,00,53,00,79,00,73,00,74,00,65,00,6D,00,33,00,32,00,5C,00,61,00,\ 63,00,70,00,70,00,61,00,67,00,65,00,2E,00,64,00,6C,00,6C,00,2C,00,2D,00,36,\ 00,30,00,30,00,33,00,00,00
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\.reg\ShellNew] "NullFile"="" "ItemName"=hex(2):40,00,43,00,3A,00,5C,00,57,00,69,00,6E,00,64,00,6F,00,77,\ 00,73,00,5C,00,72,00,65,00,67,00,65,00,64,00,69,00,74,00,2E,00,65,00,78,00,\ 65,00,2C,00,2D,00,33,00,30,00,39,00,00,00
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\.ps1\ShellNew] "NullFile"="" "ItemName"=hex(2):40,00,22,00,43,00,3A,00,5C,00,57,00,69,00,6E,00,64,00,6F,\ 00,77,00,73,00,5C,00,73,00,79,00,73,00,74,00,65,00,6D,00,33,00,32,00,5C,00,\ 77,00,69,00,6E,00,64,00,6F,00,77,00,73,00,70,00,6F,00,77,00,65,00,72,00,73,\ 00,68,00,65,00,6C,00,6C,00,5C,00,76,00,31,00,2E,00,30,00,5C,00,70,00,6F,00,\ 77,00,65,00,72,00,73,00,68,00,65,00,6C,00,6C,00,2E,00,65,00,78,00,65,00,22,\ 00,2C,00,2D,00,31,00,30,00,33,00,00,00
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit] "MUIVerb"="Run or modify..." "SubCommands"=""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\001RunwithPS] "MUIVerb"="Run with PowerShell" "Icon"="powershell.exe"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\001RunwithPS\Command] @="powershell.exe \"-Command\" \"if((Get-ExecutionPolicy ) -ne 'AllSigned') { Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass } & '%1'\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\002RunwithPSElevated] "MUIVerb"="Run with PowerShell as administrator" "HasLUAShield"="" "Icon"="powershell.exe"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\002RunwithPSElevated\Command] @="powershell.exe \"-Command\" \"\"& {Start-Process PowerShell.exe -ArgumentList '-ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -File \\\"%1\\\"' -Verb RunAs}\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\005EditwithISE] "MUIVerb"="Open in PowerShell ISE" "Icon"="powershell_ise.exe" "CommandFlags"=dword:00000020
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\005EditwithISE\Command] @="C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell_ise.exe \"%1\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\006EditwithISEelevated] "MUIVerb"="Open in PowerShell ISE as administrator" "Icon"="powershell_ise.exe" "HasLUAShield"=""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\006EditwithISEelevated\Command] @="PowerShell -windowstyle hidden -Command \"Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/s,/c,start PowerShell_ISE.exe \"\"%1\"\"' -Verb RunAs\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\007EditwithISEx86] "MUIVerb"="Open in PowerShell ISE (x86)" "Icon"="powershell_ise.exe" "CommandFlags"=dword:00000020
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\007EditwithISEx86\Command] @="C:\\Windows\\Syswow64\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell_ise.exe \"%1\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\008EditwithISEx86elevated] "MUIVerb"="Open in PowerShell ISE (x86) as administrator" "Icon"="powershell_ise.exe" "HasLUAShield"=""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\008EditwithISEx86elevated\Command] @="PowerShell -windowstyle hidden -Command \"Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/s,/c,start %windir%\\syswow64\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell_ise.exe \"\"%1\"\"' -Verb RunAs\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\009EditwithNotepad] "MUIVerb"="Open in Notepad" "Icon"="notepad.exe" "CommandFlags"=dword:00000020
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\009EditwithNotepad\Command] @="C:\\Windows\\System32\\notepad.exe \"%1\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\010EditwithNotepadElevated] "MUIVerb"="Open in Notepad as administrator" "Icon"="notepad.exe" "HasLUAShield"=""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\SystemFileAssociations\.ps1\Shell\run_edit\shell\010EditwithNotepadElevated\Command] @="PowerShell -windowstyle hidden -Command \"Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/s,/c,start notepad.exe \"\"%1\"\"' -Verb RunAs\""
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer] "MultipleInvokePromptMinimum"=dword:000000c8
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\Msi.Package\shell\Extract] @="Extract the contents" "NeverDefault"=""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\Msi.Package\shell\Extract\command] @="msiexec.exe /a \"%1\" /qb TARGETDIR=\"%1 Contents\""
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash] "MUIVerb"="Hash" "SubCommands"=""
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\01SHA1] "MUIVerb"="SHA1"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\01SHA1\Command] @="powershell.exe -noexit get-filehash -literalpath '%1' -algorithm SHA1 | format-list"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\02SHA256] "MUIVerb"="SHA256"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\02SHA256\Command] @="powershell.exe -noexit get-filehash -literalpath '%1' -algorithm SHA256 | format-list"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\03SHA384] "MUIVerb"="SHA384"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\03SHA384\Command] @="powershell.exe -noexit get-filehash -literalpath '%1' -algorithm SHA384 | format-list"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\04SHA512] "MUIVerb"="SHA512"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\04SHA512\Command] @="powershell.exe -noexit get-filehash -literalpath '%1' -algorithm SHA512 | format-list"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\05MACTripleDES] "MUIVerb"="MACTripleDES"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\05MACTripleDES\Command] @="powershell.exe -noexit get-filehash -literalpath '%1' -algorithm MACTripleDES | format-list"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\06MD5] "MUIVerb"="MD5"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\06MD5\Command] @="powershell.exe -noexit get-filehash -literalpath '%1' -algorithm MD5 | format-list"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\07RIPEMD160] "MUIVerb"="RIPEMD160"
[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Classes\*\shell\GetFileHash\shell\07RIPEMD160\Command] @="powershell.exe -noexit get-filehash -literalpath '%1' -algorithm RIPEMD160 | format-list"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall] "MUIVerb"="Windows Firewall" "Icon"="FirewallControlPanel.dll,-1" "Position"="Bottom" "SubCommands"=""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command001] "MUIVerb"="Windows Firewall" "Icon"="FirewallControlPanel.dll,-1"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command001\Command] @="RunDll32.exe shell32.dll,Control_RunDLL firewall.cpl"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command002] "MUIVerb"="Windows Firewall with Advanced Security" "HasLUAShield"=""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command002\Command] @="mmc.exe /s wf.msc"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command003] "MUIVerb"="Configure Allowed Apps" "Icon"="FirewallControlPanel.dll,-1"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command003\Command] @="explorer.exe shell:::{4026492F-2F69-46B8-B9BF-5654FC07E423} -Microsoft.WindowsFirewall\\pageConfigureApps"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command004] "MUIVerb"="Turn On Windows Firewall" "HasLUAShield"="" "CommandFlags"=dword:00000020
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command004\Command] @="powershell.exe -windowstyle hidden -command \"Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/s,/c,netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state on' -Verb runAs\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command005] "MUIVerb"="Turn Off Windows Firewall" "HasLUAShield"=""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command005\Command] @="powershell.exe -windowstyle hidden -command \"Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/s,/c,netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state off' -Verb runAs\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command006] "MUIVerb"="Reset Windows Firewall" "HasLUAShield"=""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command006\Command] @="powershell.exe -windowstyle hidden -command \"Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/s,/c,netsh advfirewall reset' -Verb runAs\""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command007] "MUIVerb"="Windows Security" "Icon"="%ProgramFiles%\\\\Windows Defender\\\\EppManifest.dll,-101"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Classes\DesktopBackground\Shell\Firewall\shell\Command007\Command] @="explorer.exe windowsdefender:"
